title: Geopolitics And Trade Mixed Messages
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
At the same time as the new US administration is realigning the American trade and foreign policies, friends and foes are sending messages of varying subtlety to the new President. As often is the case, the signals are a mixture of sticks and carrots, encouraging cooperation while providing a show of strength. In his inauguration speech, President Biden spoke about re-establishing the relationships with the country's traditional allies.
